title: olearia pannosa
intro: Olearia pannosa, also known as the scrub daisy, is a flowering plant native to Australia, characterized by its white or pink flowers and hairy leaves. The leaves and flowers of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Olearia pannosa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antibacterial activity. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and it is also used in topical applications to promote skin health and wound healing.
